title: Adding mirrored columns into a form
excerpt: Add mirrored columns into the forms

posts.author: themondaymaster (The Monday Master)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Acc , you may want to check out monday labs as I think they might have something you’re looking for to handle this. Top right hand corner if you select your profile picture you’ll see it as an option. Select monday labs and then look for “Connected boards question in WorkForms” (as pictured below) and this will allow you to select items from another board as an answer to a question.

Screenshot 2024-12-07 at 6.58.30 PM1370×230 21.2 KB

posts.author: themondaymaster (The Monday Master)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @Acc I made a video demonstrating how to use this functionality if you’re interested HERE

posts.author: anca.racu (Anca Racu)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,

Maybe this app is the answer!

I’ve got some exciting news!
Recently, we’ve built an app that’s going to make your monday implementations much easier and more efficient.
Here’s what it can do:

Allows for the replacement of mirror columns with unrestricted normal columns.(Formula and Files column not supported)
Supports the use of monday.com’s full range of functionalities like automations, integrations, filters, and formulas on these columns.
Facilitates a smoother and more flexible connection between different boards.

Give this new app a try and make your monday implementations simpler and more effective than ever!

Unlimited Mirror to Column

https://monday.com/marketplace/10000394

Best,
Anca
